title: aster altaicus var. hirsutus
intro: Aster altaicus var. hirsutus, also known as Korean mountain aster, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aster altaicus var. hirsutus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
